prompt: Describe a place you visited recently.
instruction_id: Gambarkan tempat yang baru saja kamu kunjungi. Bagaimana suasananya? Apa yang kamu lakukan di sana?
sampleAnswer: I visited a beautiful lake in the mountains last week. The water was very calm and the air was fresh. I spent the afternoon walking around the lake and taking photos. It was very peaceful and I felt very relaxed. I want to go back there again soon.
tip_id: Gunakan kata sifat deskriptif seperti 'calm', 'fresh', 'peaceful', dan 'relaxed'.

prompt: Write a short message to a friend inviting them to dinner.
instruction_id: Tulis pesan singkat untuk mengajak teman makan malam. Tentukan waktu dan tempatnya.
sampleAnswer: Hi Sarah, are you free this Friday evening? I would like to invite you to dinner at the new Italian restaurant in the city center at 7 PM. Let me know if you can come!
tip_id: Gunakan 'I would like to invite you' dan jangan lupa sebutkan waktu dan lokasi.
